description_long: This is a round, thick muffin with a slightly domed top and a golden-brown baked surface. Scattered across the top and sides are visible dark chocolate chips, some partially embedded and others protruding slightly. The muffin's surface appears matte and slightly rough, with a few cracks and uneven spots typical of a homemade or bakery-style baked good. The edges are gently rounded, and the base is flat, suggesting it was baked on a tray without a wrapper. There is no visible frosting, glaze, or decorative elements beyond the chocolate chips. The muffin is shown isolated against a plain white background, with no visible plate or support.
description: A golden-brown muffin with scattered dark chocolate chips and a slightly rough, matte surface. The muffin is round, thick, and lacks any visible wrapper or frosting.
description_view_0: This view shows the muffin's top and front, highlighting several chocolate chips and the gently domed, golden-brown surface.
description_view_1: The rear side of the muffin is visible, with fewer chocolate chips and a smoother, less textured surface.
description_view_2: This side view reveals a few clustered chocolate chips and a slightly flatter, more even surface.
description_view_3: The opposite side displays a broad, mostly chip-free area with a subtle dome and a few scattered chips.
